title: chionanthus eriorachis
intro: Chionanthus eriorachis, also known as the Chinese fringetree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chionanthus eriorachis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and relieve respiratory issues. Chionanthus eriorachis is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried flowers, which are used to treat various health conditions.
